calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-17-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Natalie Tondelli-Walsh Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per is present.
Allison Stewart, Esq. for Defendant/Appellant Yuan Guang Zheng who is also present in court.

This cause comes on calendar for a trial de novo.

10:38am Court is in session. Case is called. Appearances are stated. Parties are sworn and testifies.
Plaintiff Ms. Natalie Tondelli-Walsh present opening statements/testifies.
The following evidence is introduced.
Plaintiff's exhibit #1 - emails (4 pages)
Plaintiff's exhibit #2 - statement of witness and photos by witness (3 pages)
Plaintiff's exhibit #3 - photos and diagrams - (5 pages)
Plaintiff's exhibit #4 declaration of Defendant
Plaintiff's exhibit #5 7/16/24 email
Plaintiff's exhibit #6 - report with estimate 4240.27

10:58am Plaintiff's Witness Nikki Solis testifies.
Ms. Solis is cross-examined by Ms. Stewart on behalf of the Defense.
11:04 witness thanked and excused.

Plaintiff's exhibit #7 - damages (2 pages)
Plaintiff's exhibit #8 - employee incident report
The Court looks at previously submitted evidence in the file and shows them to both parties.
11:14am Ms. Stewart on behalf of the Defense present opening statements.
Defense present the following evidence.
Defendant's exhibit #1 - video
Defendant's exhibit #2 - photos (5 pages)
11:28am Plaintiff raise objections to the video.
11:32am Ms. Stewart responds.
11:38am Plaintiff Ms. Natalie Tondelli-Walsh presents closing remarks.
11:40am Ms. Stewart presents closing arguments on behalf of the Defense.
11:42am Plaintiff presents rebuttal.
11:45am The Court announces the Plaintiff has met its burden of proof and is entitled to $4240.27 plus $125 in court costs.
No exhibits retained,
All exhibits are returned to submitting parties.
Judge: Kathleen A. Kelly, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (220)
